# AlwaysReady Care

> Free compliance evidence software for care homes in the UK, Australia, New Zealand, Ireland, Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Record CQC/NDIS/HIQA/MD-ready evidence in under 60 seconds, track readiness across regulator categories, and export inspection packs on demand. Browser-based, no rip-and-replace of existing care planning systems.

Core concept: a dedicated evidence layer that works alongside any existing care planning software (Person Centred Software, Nourish, Log my Care, Vivendi PD, etc.). Free to start; Pro plans from £79/month per home.

## Primary (UK / CQC)

- [Home — UK CQC](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/): Overview, pricing, evidence capture workflow
- [CQC Inspection Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/inspection-checklist/): 21-category readiness checklist mapped to CQC quality statements
- [Guide](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/guide.html): Getting-started workflow for care managers

## CQC 5 Key Questions Framework

- [Framework overview](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/)
- [Safe](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/safe/)
- [Effective](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/effective/)
- [Caring](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/caring/)
- [Responsive](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/responsive/)
- [Well-led](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/well-led/)

## UK Regions (CQC)

- [Regions index](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/) — London, South East, South West, East of England, Midlands, North West, North East & Yorkshire, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland

## Australia (Aged Care Quality Standards)

- [AU Home](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/)
- [AU Inspection Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/inspection-checklist/)
- [AU Standards](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/): Person, Organisation, Clinical care, Environment, Food & nutrition, Workforce, Feedback & improvement
- [AU Regions](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/regions/): NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, NT, ACT

## New Zealand (Ngā Paerewa Health & Disability Standards)

- [NZ Home](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/)
- [NZ Inspection Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/inspection-checklist/)
- [NZ Standards](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/standards/): Consumer rights, Organisational management, Continuum of service, Safe environment
- [NZ Regions](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/): 20 district health regions including Auckland, Canterbury, Waikato, Wellington, Tairāwhiti

## Ireland (HIQA)

- [IE Home](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/)
- [IE Inspection Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/inspection-checklist/)
- [IE Standards](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/standards/): Person-centred care, Effective services, Safe services, Health & wellbeing, Leadership & governance, Workforce, Use of resources, Use of information
- [IE Regions](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/regions/): CHO 1–9

## Germany (MD-Prüfung / Qualitätsprüfungs-Richtlinien)

- [DE Home](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/)
- [DE (English)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de-en/)
- [MD-Prüfung Checkliste](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/md-pruefung-checkliste/)
- [MD-Prüfung Vorbereitung](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/md-pruefung-vorbereitung/)
- [Qualitätsindikatoren-Check](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/qualitaetsindikatoren-check/)
- [Pflegedokumentation-Vorlagen](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegedokumentation-vorlagen/)
- [SIS-Formulierungshilfen](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/sis-formulierungshilfen/)
- [Pflegegrad-Rechner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegegrad-rechner/)
- [Pflegeheim eröffnen](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegeheim-eroeffnen/)
- [Pflegesoftware-Vergleich](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegesoftware-vergleich/)

## Expertenstandards (DE)

- [Overview](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/) — Dekubitusprophylaxe, Demenz, Entlassungsmanagement, Ernährungsmanagement, Kontinenzförderung, Mobilität, Schmerzmanagement, Sturzprophylaxe, Wundversorgung

## Bundesländer (DE)

- [Overview](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/bundeslaender/) — All 16 states: Baden-Württemberg, Bayern, Berlin, Brandenburg, Bremen, Hamburg, Hessen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Niedersachsen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Saarland, Sachsen, Sachsen-Anhalt, Schleswig-Holstein, Thüringen

## Austria & Switzerland

- [Österreich](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/oesterreich/)
- [Schweiz](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/schweiz/)

## Features

- Evidence capture in under 60 seconds (photo, voice, text)
- AI structuring of raw notes into regulator-aligned records
- Compliance dashboard across 21 CQC categories / equivalent regional frameworks
- Inspection pack export (PDF) on demand
- Follow-up action tracking
- Multi-site management
- Offline support, works on phone
- 12 record templates

## Optional

- [Privacy](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/privacy/)
- [Cookies](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/cookies/)
- [Impressum (DE)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/impressum/)
- [Datenschutz (DE)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/datenschutz/)
